title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what has caused these environmental problems and what effects they might have on both people and the natural world.

images.label: A
images.description: Workers in protective suits cleaning up a large oil spill on a rocky coastline.

images.label: B
images.description: An aerial view of a vast area of deforested land with smoke rising from burning trees.

followUp.question: Which environmental challenge do you think is the most urgent to address? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why these people might have chosen to spend time in nature and what they might gain from the experience.

images.label: D
images.description: A group of volunteers of different ages planting young trees in a local park.

images.label: E
images.description: A family hiking along a trail through a dense, sunlit national forest.

followUp.question: Which activity do you think is the most valuable for developing people's connection with nature? (Why?)
